The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Programming\\projects\\blog\\blog-ap.serviceRawFile:
org: moullxndev
service: blog-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs22.x
  architecture: arm64
  region: us-east-1
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  environment:
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPool
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient

package:
  individually: true

custom:
  esbuild:
    bundle: true
    minify: true
    sourcemap: false

functions:
  - ${file(./sls/functions/auth.yml)}

resources:
  - ${file(./sls/resources/cognito.yml)}
